items.text: Phrolova, when this piece is truly complete, I'll come back.
Yes. No matter where I am, I'll return.
Every promise matters. Once I make one, I'll see it through, no matter the cost.

items.speaker: Welcoming Neighbor
items.text: Phrolova, don't forget! We're off to the neighboring city tomorrow!

items.speaker: Curious Audience
items.text: Phrolova, could you tell us the story behind that tune you're conducting?

items.speaker: Close Friend
items.text: Phrolova, we made a promise. Friends forever, through thick and thin. Neither of us will ever leave the other behind.

items.speaker: Pessimistic Scholar
items.text: Phrolova, Reverberations from human death are destined to disperse or distort. If they become Tacet Discords, they're no longer human.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: What I couldn't do back then… I can make happen now...

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Your bones will no longer be marrowless. Your blood will no longer be cold...

items.speaker: Distressed Family Member
items.text: Phrolova, keep living… We long to be by your side…

items.speaker: Relieved Tutor
items.text: Phrolova, I've faith that the melody you weave with your baton will change the world one day…

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: The world is but a symphony of resonating frequencies. Humans may fall to be Tacet Discords, and Tacet Discords may rise again as humans... There is no divide between us.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: I have long erased that line. So can everyone else.
